markets.rules_primary: If either team scores a run in the first inning of the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Atlanta vs Pittsburgh First Inning Run?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Atlanta and Pittsburgh go to extra innings in the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Pittsburgh wins the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Atlanta vs Pittsburgh Winner?

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jul 6, 2026 2 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 79.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 79.99° on Jul 6, 2026 at 2pm EDT?
